title: postregisteruseraccountcreation
description: Test user registration with valid details to ensure account is created successfully and appropriate success status is returned.

title: postregisterduplicateuserregistration
description: Test user registration with an existing email or username to verify the system returns a 409 conflict or validation error.

title: postloginvalidcredentials
description: Test login with correct username and password to confirm successful authentication and session creation.

title: postlogininvalidcredentials
description: Test login with incorrect credentials to ensure the system returns a 401 unauthorized response.

title: postmfaverifyloginvalidotp
description: Test MFA verification with a valid OTP to confirm access is granted and a success response is returned.

title: postmfaverifylogininvalidotp
description: Test MFA verification with an invalid or expired OTP to verify the system returns a 400 or 401 error indicating verification failure.

title: getdashboardwithauthentication
description: Test accessing the dashboard endpoint with a valid authenticated session to receive 200 status and dashboard metrics.

title: getdashboardwithoutauthentication
description: Test accessing the dashboard endpoint without valid authentication to ensure a 401 unauthorized response is returned.

title: getrecordswithauthentication
description: Test retrieving the livestock directory with a valid session to confirm 200 status and correct data is returned.

title: postaddrecordvaliddata
description: Test adding a new livestock record with complete and valid goat data to verify successful record creation and appropriate success status.
